overall.description: Slow cinematic movement through the Great Hall of a gothic castle, featuring floating candles, long dining tables with students in robes, and high vaulted stone ceilings. Game engine footage with warm candlelight and detailed medieval architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

segments.scene_description: A slow forward movement through a magnificent gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables. Floating candles illuminate the space from above, casting warm light on the stone columns and high vaulted ceiling. The camera moves steadily down the central aisle between the crowded tables where students in robes are eating and socializing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady progression through a magnificent gothic great hall, moving from the grand scale of the architecture toward the intimate activity of the dining students. It begins with a wide perspective of the high vaulted ceilings and stone columns, where floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow over the entire space. As the camera glides forward, the focus shifts from the overhead grandeur to the central aisle, drawing closer to the long wooden tables. The scene then expands into the lively atmosphere of the hall, passing by students in robes who are eating and socializing before continuing its seamless journey deeper into the heart of the gathering.
